goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of boat. Make sure you get entrance fee. You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called huntingdon marriott hotel. Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 7 people and 4 nights starting from saturday. Make sure you get the reference number. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to leave the hotel by 17:15. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: We are visiting for a couple days and would like to see some boat attractions in town.  What do you have available?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Depends on what area of town you'll be visiting.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I haven't decided on what area of town I will be staying in, I would just like to know the boat attractions please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are only boat attractions in the east, north and centre so If i was you I wouldn't stay in the west or south.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Ok.  I would like the name of a specific boat attraction please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The camboats in the east side is highly suggested.  Would you like any information on them?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: What is the entrance fee?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I'm sorry, but I have checked all the boat attractions in the other areas of town and none have entrance fees listed. Can I help with something else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, can you get me information about Huntingdon Marriott Hotel?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: It's an expensive 4 star hotel at kingfisher way, hinchinbrook business park, huntingdon on the west side of town. Phone number is 01480446000 and postcode is pe296fl. Provides free internet/parking.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Can I book lodging for 7 people starting on Saturday? We're staying for 4 nights.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Your booking was successful, your reference number is GOL43A42. What else can I help you with today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I also need a taxi between the two places that leaves the hotel by 17:15, please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You are all set. Be expecting a blue Audi. Please call 07750823972 should you need to reach them.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thank you for your help.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Thank you for contacting us and have a nice day.

goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and doesn't need to have free parking. The hotel should be in the cheap price range. If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free parking. Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 1 people and 2 nights starting from saturday. If the booking fails how about wednesday. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of swimmingpool and should be in the centre. Make sure you get address. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to leave the attraction by 21:00. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I'm looking for a place to stay in Cambridge

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I can help you with that.  Do you prefer hotels or guesthouses?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: That does not matter but I would like it in the cheap price range.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There is a bed and breakfast on 56 saint barnabas road by the name of Alexander, with free parking, internet and 4 star rated. All in a very cheap price.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: That sounds perfect. That's all I needed for today, thanks.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Enjoy your stay in Cambridge, have a great day!

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I would like to find a pool as well.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are 4 to choose from. Would you rather go to one located in the east, north, or centre?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Let's put the pool on hold. I forgot to ask you to book the Alexander for me. It is just me for two nights beginning Saturday.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I'd be happy to reserve your rooms for you. How many people will you be traveling with?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: There is only me.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Your booking for Alexander bed and breakfast was successful. The reference number is F371FPBA. What else can I do for you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Please arrange for a taxi to pick me up from the attraction at 21:00 and take me to the hotel. I'll need car and contact info too.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: We didnt pick out a pool yet, any preference in area?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, I'd like in to be in the centre of town

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I am sorry I need to know where you are going?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I would like a swimming pool at the centre of town.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Parkside pool is in the centre of town. The address is gonville place and the phone number is 01223445100.

goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should have a star of 4. The hotel should be in the north. Make sure you get hotel type. You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the same area as the hotel. Make sure you get phone number and entrance fee. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to leave the hotel by 14:15. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Hello, can you recommend a 4-star hotel with free parking, please?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are 19 four-star hotels with free parking in Cambridge. Do you have a price range or area of town in mind?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I would like a hotel in the north, please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Kirkwood is a wonderful hotel in the north, would you like a reservation.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Not at this time. Thank you.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Okay thank you for calling.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I am though looking for places to go in the north as well.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Milton Country Park is beautiful this time of year. Or perhaps Riverboat Georgina? They are both in the north.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Milton Country Park sounds nice, can I get their phone number and entrance fee?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Their phone number is 01223420060 and the admission is free.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thanks for the recommendations. The last thing is I need a taxi between the hotel and Milton Country Park. Can you help?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Sure thing. When would you like to arrive by?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I want to leave the hotel by 14:15

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I booked you a grey volvo. Call them at 07307595781 if anything comes up. What else do you need today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I actually am all set now! Thanks for being so helpful! Bye now!

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I'm glad I could help, have a great time.

goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called regency gallery. Make sure you get attraction type and entrance fee. You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 4 and should include free wifi. The hotel should be in the north and should include free parking. Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 6 people and 2 nights starting from saturday. If the booking fails how about 1 nights. Make sure you get the reference number. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to leave the hotel by 04:00. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I am looking for regency gallery.  Can you tell me where it is located?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The regency gallery address is 39 fitzroy street in the centre area.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Okay, what kind of place is it?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: It is a museum. Would you like the phone number?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Maybe. Unless you can just tell me what the entrance fee is and then I won't need it?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Fortunately, it is free entry. Is there anything else I can help you with?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, I'd like a place to stay, too, please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I'm happy to help. Where in the city would you like your hotel to be located?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I'd like a room in the north please

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are 13 different places to stay, do you have a preference on price or amenities?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I would like a hotel that has open bookings for 6 people for 2 nights starting from Saturday.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Unfortunately, I can't find any openings for those nights in the north. Would you like to try a different part of town?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No. Is there availability for 1 night?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You're in luck. I've got a room available for saturday at the acorn guest house for 6 people. It's booked, your reference # is 3IX7EGRG.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Okay. Can you book me a taxi as well? I want to leave the hotel by 04:00.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Where would you like to go?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I'd like to commute between the two places.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Ok I booked you a taxi to leave the acorn guest house at 4:00. The car will be a blue toyota and the contact number is 07424241550.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Wonderful, you've been very helpful! That's all I need for today, thank you!

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Great, thanks for using our service. have a great day.

goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the east. Make sure you get attraction type and postcode. You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 4 and should include free wifi. The hotel should be in the same area as the attraction. Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 3 people and 4 nights starting from saturday. Make sure you get the reference number. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to leave the hotel by 09:45. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Are there any places in the east of town that are recommended to go to? Thanks.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Yes, several. The Cambridge Museum of Technology is good, or if you're in a more aquatic frame of mind there's the Abbey Pool and Astroturf Pitch. Do they sound appealing?

non-categorical.value: the Abbey Pool and Astroturf Pitch

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I need the postcode please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The postcode for the museum is cb58ld.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Can you book tickets for me?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I'm sorry, our service can't book museums but their phone is 01223368650.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Okay thankyou. I'd llike to find a 4 star hotel with wifi.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Do you have a price range in mind?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Nope.  Pick a hotel you think I would like too.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: What area should it be in?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I'd like it to be the same area as the attraction.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Carolina bed and breakfast is a great moderately priced guesthouse. Would you like me to make a reservation for you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes. I need it booked for Saturday. 3 people, 4 nights. I'll also need the reference number.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You are booked, the reference number is WK64YQ5Y, can I help with anything else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, I'll also need a taxi to commute between the two places. I want to leave the hotel by 9:45.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I've reserved a black Ford for your taxi service. The contact number is 07980459302. Is there anything else I can do for you today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Ok that's all I need thank you.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You are welcome. Take care. Goodbye.
